sky.role: From Technical Expertise to Web Project Management.
sky.description: Hi, I'm Elliot. At 23, I'm based in the heart of the Lille metropolitan area. My journey began in lines of code, where pure logic meets creation. Today, I'm rising to become the central pillar of web projects: a manager who speaks the language of developers while translating clients' business needs. My vision? Creating a fusion between technical innovation and human-centered support.

mountain.title: My Journey
mountain.subtitle: Every step brings a new altitude

forest.title: My Skills
forest.subtitle: A dense and diverse ecosystem of knowledge
forest.intro: My expertise is an ecosystem. While my roots draw strength from algorithmic logic and pure development, my canopy thrives today in project management and human support. Here are the tools and know-how I mobilise to drive your ambitions.

lake.title: Let's stay in touch
lake.subtitle: A web project is a collective adventure. Whether you need a technical backbone or a guide for your next projects, let's talk over a coffee (or a screen).
lake.success: Message sent! I'll get back to you shortly.
